description: baseline (AdamW, default config)
lower weight decay to 0.1
halve total batch size to 2^16
increase matrix LR to 0.04
reduce depth from 8 to 4

halve batch size to 2^14: device_batch=8, no grad accum, 2x training steps
switch window pattern SSSL→LLLL: all full-context attention depth=4
increase depth from 4 to 6, keep same width (model_dim=256, aspect_ratio=42)
increase depth from 6 to 8, aspect_ratio 42→32 (model_dim=256 unchanged)
increase depth 8→10 aspect_ratio 32→24 (model_dim=256 same): worse
reduce HEAD_DIM 128→64 (4 heads vs 2): worse
replace ReSquared activation with SiLU
warmup 0→0.05: no improvement, worse by 0.195
SwiGLU MLP (8/3 expansion) vs SiLU (4x): worse
switch window pattern SSSL→LLLL with SiLU: all full-context attention (depth=8)
shorter warmdown 0.5→0.25: worse by 0.034
add global gradient norm clipping (clip=1.0): worse by 0.017
increase adam beta1 0.8→0.9: more momentum, worse by 0.021
increase adam beta2 0.95→0.99: worse by 0.018
FINAL_LR_FRAC 0.0→0.1: ends warmdown at 10% LR, slightly worse
raise logit cap 15→30: sharper output probabilities
raise logit cap 30→50: worse, not sharper
reduce NS steps 5→3: more training steps but worse orthogonalization
NS steps 5→7: more orthogonalization, worse by 0.001 (1.3026 vs 1.3016)
zero weight_decay for NS (Muon) block matrix params: WD 0.2→0.0, NS orthogonalization is self-regularizing
increase embedding LR 0.6→1.0: higher effective LR for wte+value_embeds, slightly worse
increase x0_lambdas init 0.1→0.3: stronger input skip-connection signal per layer
increase x0_lambdas init 0.3→0.5: stronger input skip-connection signal

cosine warmdown instead of linear: worse by 0.028 (1.3114 vs 1.2834)
halve batch size 2^13→2^12 device_batch=2: more steps but worse regularization
ve_gate full residual (256 channels) vs restricted (32): worse by 0.030
longer warmdown 0.5→0.6: LR decay starts earlier, worse by 0.025 (1.3082 vs 1.2834)
increase MATRIX_LR 0.04→0.05: worse by 0.031
x0_lambdas beta1 0.96→0.8: faster adapt of skip gates, worse by 0.020

label smoothing 0.1: metric mismatch—model optimizes smoothed loss but BPB evaluates raw CE, worse by 0.319
